for-agent-digest: This protocol mandates high-fidelity agentic action traces. Before execution, agents MUST declare the GAMMA Mode (scientific or debugging). Always maintain strict Problem-Solution Chains (PSC), documenting the 'why' before the 'how'. Ensure every directive is autonomous, verifiable, and free of version suffixes. Map deterministic targets using unified schemas. Execute terminal actions with precision, registering every newly generated skill to the central ledger.

scientific.research_question: Define the hypothesis or data query.
scientific.corpus_scope: Define the papers, datasets, or codebases inspected.
scientific.method_evidence: Define the tool or logic used to extract findings.
scientific.output_artifact: The resulting Markdown, JSON, or visualization.

debug.observed_vs_expected: Description of failure and target state.
debug.reproduction: Steps or script to trigger the error.
